name: Chayote Salad
recipeIngredient: Chopped red bell peppers - to garnish
recipeInstructions:
1. Shred the chayote using a cheese grater.
2. Toss the shredded chayote with diced tomatoes, chopped spring onions, and shredded basil leaves in a bowl.
3. Garnish with sliced red bell peppers.
4. Drizzle with vinaigrette or mayonnaise to taste.
